translation.literal_translation: And indeed from being taught as qualified by bliss. (15)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.15: Brahman-reference is fixed because the prior topic is explicitly sukha-visista Brahman.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra seal for topic continuity via bliss qualification.
